Video.summary: Welcome to Week 3, Day 1 of the NCPA San Diego Regional 2025, live from the Barnes Tennis Center in the heart of San Diego, California. This highly anticipated state rivalry pits the UCLA Bruins against the SDSU Aztecs in a crucial best-of-seven collegiate team match.The match format prioritizes singles, with UCLA winning the coin toss and opting to start with Women's Singles. The broadcast features the Women's Singles match between Mae Lee (UCLA) and Emily Miller (SDSU), and the Men's Singles where SDSU's Preston Lynch takes a commanding early lead. The match also includes Gender Doubles, where SDSU (the Aztecs) took an early 3-0 lead in the overall match score. The winner of this pool play match gains a strong position for seeding, moving closer to securing one of the National Championship bids.
Video.title: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Image.alt: NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU
NCPA San Diego Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UCLA vs. SDSU

Video.summary: Live from the NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025, this pivotal collegiate team match features Kennesaw State (KSU) facing off against Virginia Tech. The action kicks off with a mixed doubles showdown chosen by coin-toss winner Virginia Tech.Watch as Virginia Tech's Cody Miller and Heather Murphy bring their A-game against KSU's Yuri Yadi and Sophia Fiona. The match also features men's doubles with Kellen Funk and Cody Miller representing the Hokies, while Parth Modi and his partner fight to keep KSU's hopes alive. With crucial seeding for bracket play on the line, both teams battle through intense rallies and strategic plays in this pool play matchup.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech
NCPA Virginia Beach Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - Kennesaw State vs. Virginia Tech

Video.summary: Rick Witsken and John Sperling take on David Furman and Stefan Andren in this Men's Senior Pro Doubles Quarterfinal Match.

US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Quarterfinal

Video.summary: Jaime Oncins and Simone Jardim take on Lee Whitwell and Andrei Daescu in this Mixed Pro Split Age Gold Medal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Mixed Pro Split Age - Gold Medal Match

Video.summary: Experience the thrilling showdown at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships as twin brothers Hunter Johnson and Yates Johnson face off for the very first time in the men's pro singles gold medal match. Both top seeds with years of experience playing doubles together, these brothers bring a unique dynamic filled with expert strategy, rapid exchanges, and emotional rivalry. From early leads and tactical shot-making to late-game drama and camaraderie, watch Hunter and Yates battle it out point by point in a historic and captivating final. Featuring expert commentary and insights into their playing styles, this match is a must-watch for pickleball fans everywhere.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson
US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Singles Gold Medal – Hunter Johnson vs Yates Johnson

Video.summary: In this high-stakes Bronze Medal match at the 2023 US Open Pickleball Championships, veteran competitors Jenny Klitch and Sheri Courter go head-to-head with Ellen Novoseletsky and Jenny Marcos. Expect calculated teamwork, steady hands, and sharp strategy as these seasoned senior pros compete for a podium finish. Filmed live from Naples, Florida, this match showcases the competitive spirit and skill that define senior pro pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos
US Open 2023 – Women’s Senior Pro Doubles Bronze – Klitch & Courter vs Novoseletsky & Marcos

NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)
NPL - Drivers vs Bruisers (Womens)

Video.summary: The stakes are sky-high in this 2024 National Pickleball League Women’s Doubles Championship as the Coachella Valley Scorpions' dynamic duo, Molly Carter and Kelly Ojeda, take on the formidable Denver Iconics pairing of Stacy Zelenski and Lily Kordic Mueller. Filmed at a championship stop on the NPL tour, this intense match features fierce net battles, pinpoint placement, and relentless energy on both sides of the court. Watch as Carter & Ojeda push the pace and mount a relentless offensive, while Zelenski & Kordic Mueller counter with sharp angles and strategic resets. A hard-fought final that captures the spirit, skill, and teamwork of professional women’s pickleball.
Video.title: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Image.alt: NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller
NPL 2024 – Women’s Doubles Championship – Carter & Ojeda vs Zelenski & Kordic Mueller

Video.summary: The episode kicks off with the women's singles match, where the Miami team battles it out against the Fort Myers Flamingos. The focus shifts to men's singles in the second half of the game, highlighting the veteran Miami team and their notable chemistry on the court. Tune in to see key plays, player highlights, and team strategy.
Video.title: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Image.alt: AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos
AFPL Stop 4 Championship Court - Game 1 - Miami Blaze vs. Fort Myers Flamingos

Video.summary: In this US Open 2025 Pro Women's Doubles match, the Waters duo (Anna Lee Waters and Lee Waters) take on Amanda Rosati and Kaitlyn Campbell. The commentators highlight the Waters' dominant performance, particularly Anna Lee's disguised shots and aggressive play, as they secure a swift victory. They also discuss the challenges of the progressive draw format in pickleball and preview Anna Lee Waters' upcoming mixed doubles match with Andre Agassi.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell
US Open 2025 - Pro Women's Doubles - Waters/Waters vs. Rosati/Campbell

Video.summary: This championship game highlights the strategic play, including lobs and speed-ups, as both teams battle for the gold. A key dynamic of this match is that Courter and Carter had the advantage of playing under the shaded court conditions just before, while Dawson and Williams were coming from outside. Jen Dawson is noted as being a seasoned player on this court, having a triple crown in the Senior Pro divisions.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams
US Open 2025 - Women's Sr. Pro Doubles - Courter/Carter vs. Dawson/Williams

Video.summary: Get ready for a one-of-a-kind pickleball experience at the Minto U.S. Open Pickleball Championships, powered by Margaritaville. This video features highlights from the Pro Mixed Doubles match between Valdes/Gabrielsen and Barr/Lane. Watch Brandon Lane's commanding presence on the court, as he strategically positions himself at the kitchen line to capture any balls he can. The tournament is held at a beautiful facility in Naples, Florida, which is unlike any other in the world, and draws tens of thousands of people.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane
US Open 2025 - Pro Mixed Doubles - Valdes/Gabrielsen vs. Barr/Lane

Austin North and Doug Ellin

Video.summary: Experience the "clash for the ages" as host city Mumbai Pickle Power takes on their fierce rivals, Delhi Dilwale, in a thrilling Day 2 encounter of the World Pickleball League Season 2. The day begins on a somber note with a tribute to the late Deputy Chief Minister of Maharashtra, Shri Ajit Pawar, as players compete with black armbands in front of a quieted stadium.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Delhi World - Day 2 Tie 1

Video.summary: The World Pickleball League Season 2 continues at the Jio World Garden in Mumbai with a critical Day 4 clash between the Rajasthan Titans and the league-leading Chennai Super Champs. Entering the tie as heavy favorites, coach Johnny Goldberg’s Chennai squad looks to solidify their top spot on the leaderboard. Meanwhile, the Rajasthan Titans, led by coach Leigh Whitwell, are desperate to find their rhythm and climb the points table after a challenging start to the season.
Video.title: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 - Rajasthan vs Chennai - Day 4 Tie 1

Video.summary: The 2025 European Pickleball Championships in Rome, Italy, hosts the Senior Women's Doubles Final under the floodlights . Team England, represented by Kirsty Gray and Anna Linton, faces off against Team Spain's Monica Ramirez and Araceli Senciales .After a strong start where England establishes an early lead, the match tightens as Spain finds their rhythm in the second game . Witness the strategic battle as Gray utilizes precision lobs to disrupt the Spanish defense , while Linton delivers powerful drives to secure critical points . In a high-stakes contest for the gold medal, England targets their opponents' positioning to close out the championship .
Video.title: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Image.alt: Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales
Senior Women's Doubles Final - Gray/Linton vs. Ramirez/Senciales

Video.summary: It's the moment of truth! Championship Sunday has arrived for the World Pickleball League (WPBL) as the Bengaluru Jawans take on Pune United for the title. Prepare yourself for an intense matchup -from Men's Singles right through to Mixed Doubles!
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals
WPBL 2025 - Bengaluru vs. Pune - Finals

Video.summary: Watch the opening tie of the World Pickleball League (WPBL) from the CCI Brabourne Stadium! The action features Men's Singles between American Champion Brandon Lane (Mumbai) and Polish #1 Mathias Matysik (Pune), followed by Women's Doubles (Katie Morris & Glauca Lane) and Men's Doubles where Vansh Kapadia and his partner secure Pune's first match win. Experience high-stakes professional pickleball where every point counts for the WPBL semi-finals.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai Pickle Power vs. Pune United - Day 1 Tie 1

Video.summary: Day 7 of the World Pickleball League brings a critical and dramatic game between Mumbai Pickle Power and the Bengaluru Jawans. The game begins with a highly anticipated Men's Singles match featuring Mumbai's American star Brandon Lane against Bengaluru's Jack Foster. The match lives up to the hype, showcasing fierce action.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
WPBL 2025 - Mumbai vs. Bengaluru - Day 7 Tie 1
